name: Power User Activity Threshold
description: Calculates the top 10%, 8%, 5% of user activity every fortnight looking back ~4 months and finds the average to help create power user definitions. Then will craft the SQL to run to update stage2.customer_product_processing_configuration_settings. Requires users.sql and user metrics - activity count.sql to be already defined for a given customer. Run by typing /user_activity [customer name]

name: Technical Requirements Generator
description: Given the completed Success Plan slide deck and any additional documents from a customer about their CS process, this skill will create a Google Sheet list of technical requirements for the implementation process

name: Echo Prompt Generator (all prompts)
description: Given documents from a customer that describe their CS processes and playbooks, this skill creates all the prompts in a customised format needed for Echo
